output.sparql:
SELECT ?previousName WHERE {
  wd:Q4159703 wdt:P1545 ?season .
  ?season wdt:P31 wd:Q6902071 .
  ?season wdt:P162 wd:Q507563 .
  ?season wdt:P585 ?date .
  FILTER (year(?date) = 2011)
  ?season wdt:P115 ?team .
  ?team wdt:P195 ?university .
  ?university wdt:P1222 ?enrollment .
  ?university wdt:P1815 ?stadium .
  ?stadium wdt:P138 ?previousName .
  ORDER BY ASC(?enrollment)
  LIMIT 1
}

args.sparql:
SELECT ?previousName WHERE {
  wd:Q4159703 wdt:P1545 ?season .
  ?season wdt:P31 wd:Q6902071 .
  ?season wdt:P162 wd:Q507563 .
  ?season wdt:P585 ?date .

  ?season wdt:P115 ?team .
  ?team wdt:P195 ?university .
  ?university wdt:P1222 ?enrollment .
  ?university wdt:P1815 ?stadium .
  ?stadium wdt:P138 ?previousName .
  ORDER BY ASC(?enrollment)
  LIMIT 1
}
args.answer: The previous name of the stadium used by the university with the lowest enrollment in the 2011 CIS football season is "Dufferin Park".
